title: Nadaan
subTitle: Ranimaa's animosity towards a small community deepens when her niece and heir, Seema, falls in love with a man hailing from the same community.

title: Heeralal Pannalal
subTitle: Heeralal and Pannalal are twins who face humorous situations when they are mistaken for another set of twins with the same name. Unaware of their namesakes, they set out on a journey of love and adventure.

title: Nadaan
subTitle: Ranimaa's animosity towards a small community deepens when her niece and heir, Seema, falls in love with a man hailing from the same community.

title: Khoon Ka Karz
subTitle: Karan, Kishan and Arjun are brought up in an orphanage. Later, they get pulled into the underworld of crime, however, unexpected truths force them to change paths.

title: Guddu
subTitle: Fate plays a cruel game with Salina and Guddu, testing their bond and threatening to tear their lives apart with tragedy and terminal illness.

title: Rakhwale
subTitle: Upon getting falsely incriminated for a murder, a man flees from prison. So, while trying to collect evidence and prove his innocence, he meets people who willingly help him.

title: Train to Pakistan
subTitle: A small Punjab community deals with high political and ethnic tensions in the wake of India's independence from Britain.

title: Chhoti Si Baat
subTitle: Arun, a timorous man, falls for Prabha but is reluctant to express his feelings. However, things take a turn when Nagesh attempts to woo Prabha.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Kumar, who lives in Africa, keeps getting dreams of a railway station called Viran Nagar. When he arrives in India, the villagers believe him to be a ghost and share an unsettling tale.

title: Gaban
subTitle: Ramanath, the unemployed son of an honest clerk, gets arrested for embezzlement and faces prison time. The only way he can set himself free is to testify against freedom fighters.

title: Teri Payal Mere Geet
subTitle: Premi makes a living by selling poems to Benni and falls in love with a courtesan, Laila Jaan. However, he leaves her after finding the truth about her but tries to get back with her.

title: Param Dharam
subTitle: Savitri believes that her illegitimate child with her deceased lover, Vijay, was stillborn and did not survive. Years later, Savitri's world changes when she learns that her firstborn is alive.

title: Dil Tera Aashiq
subTitle: Thakur Ranvir Singh Chaudhary cuts ties with his sister after she marries a man from a different background. However, when she dies, the responsibility of looking after her children falls on him.

title: Vidrohi
subTitle: A law-abiding police officer gets trapped in the web of a cunning ploy devised by two criminals. After receiving a death sentence, he escapes prison to avenge the injustice.

title: Shiv Ganga
subTitle: When Kamdev attempts to provoke feelings of lust in Lord Shiva with the arrow of love, he faces a wrath that threatens his life.
